document: REVISED REGULATORY FRAMEWORK FOR BANK VERIFICATION NUMBER (BVN) OPERATIONS AND WATCH-LIST FOR THE NIGERIAN BANKING INDUSTRY 121021 FINAL (Nigeria - Row 11)

sections.summary: Defines roles and responsibilities of participants in BVN system and Watch-list for Nigerian banking industry to combat fraud and enhance public confidence.
sections.dtia_summary: Requires banks to link customer BVNs to accounts within 24 hours, report breaches to Watch-list within 1 business day, and enforce sanctions for non-compliance with BVN operations.

requirements.text: Banks must link customer BVNs to accounts within 24 hours of NIBSS making BVN available
Report BVNs of individuals in breach to NIBSS for Watch-list update within 1 business day
Enforce sanctions on customers with Watch-listed BVNs including restricting electronic channels

sections.source_quote: Banks shall ensure all operated accounts/wallets (except Tier 1) ... are linked with the signatories' BVNs within 24 hours of NIBSS making BVN available.
